repos.name: microsoft/markitdown
repos.desc: Python tool for converting files and office documents to Markdown.

repos.name: harry0703/MoneyPrinterTurbo
repos.desc: 利用AI大模型，一键生成高清短视频 Generate short videos with one click using AI LLM.

repos.name: anthropics/claude-code
repos.desc: Claude Code is an agentic coding tool that lives in your terminal, understands your codebase, and helps you code faster by executing routine tasks, explaining complex code, and handling git workflows - all through natural language commands.

repos.name: cursor/plugins
repos.desc: Cursor plugin specification and official plugins

repos.name: revfactory/harness
repos.desc: A meta-skill that designs domain-specific agent teams, defines specialized agents, and generates the skills they use.

repos.name: EveryInc/compound-engineering-plugin
repos.desc: Official Compound Engineering plugin for Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, and more

repos.name: affaan-m/ECC
repos.desc: The agent harness performance optimization system. Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond.

repos.name: OpenBMB/VoxCPM
repos.desc: VoxCPM2: Tokenizer-Free TTS for Multilingual Speech Generation, Creative Voice Design, and True-to-Life Cloning

repos.name: galilai-group/stable-worldmodel
repos.desc: A platform for reproducible world model research and evaluation

repos.name: Crosstalk-Solutions/project-nomad
repos.desc: Project N.O.M.A.D, is a self-contained, offline survival computer packed with critical tools, knowledge, and AI to keep you informed and empowered—anytime, anywhere.

repos.name: run-llama/liteparse
repos.desc: A fast, helpful, and open-source document parser

repos.name: chen08209/FlClash
repos.desc: A multi-platform proxy client based on ClashMeta,simple and easy to use, open-source and ad-free.

repos.name: FareedKhan-dev/train-llm-from-scratch
repos.desc: A straightforward method for training your LLM, from downloading data to generating text.

repos.name: ruvnet/RuView
repos.desc: π RuView turns commodity WiFi signals into real-time spatial intelligence, vital sign monitoring, and presence detection — all without a single pixel of video.

repos.name: DataTalksClub/data-engineering-zoomcamp
repos.desc: Data Engineering Zoomcamp is a free 9-week course on building production-ready data pipelines. The next cohort starts in January 2026. Join the course here 👇🏼

repos.name: OpenMOSS/MOSS-TTS
repos.desc: MOSS‑TTS Family is an open‑source speech and sound generation model family from MOSI.AI and the OpenMOSS team. It is designed for high‑fidelity, high‑expressiveness, and complex real‑world scenarios, covering stable long‑form speech, multi‑speaker dialogue, voice/character design, environmental sound effects, and real‑time streaming TTS.

repos.name: dreammis/social-auto-upload
repos.desc: 自动化上传视频到社交媒体：抖音、小红书、视频号、tiktok、youtube、bilibili

repos.name: codecrafters-io/build-your-own-x
repos.desc: Master programming by recreating your favorite technologies from scratch.

> 📅 2026-05-31  |  🔍 共收录 19 个热门项目

又到了一天一度的「看看别人在卷什么」环节。准备好你的 star 键，Let's go 🚀
